seoTitle: Willunga South vs Wilmington — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Willunga South and Wilmington. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Willunga South vs Wilmington: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Willunga South and Wilmington.
heading: Willunga South vs Wilmington — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Willunga South, South Australia and Wilmington, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Wilmington has a lower overall climate risk score (37/100) compared to Willunga South (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Willunga South or Wilmington safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Willunga South has a flood risk score of 26/100, while Wilmington scores 33/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Willunga South scores 49/100 for bushfire risk. Wilmington scores 50/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Willunga South or Wilmington?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Wilmington has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.2% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
